title: kobresia tibetica subsp. littledalei
intro: Kobresia tibetica subsp. littledalei, also known as Tibetan grass or Little Dale's Kobresia, is a type of sedge plant native to the high-altitude regions of Tibet. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health, due to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Kobresia tibetica subsp. littledalei is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
